center.id: loc-约翰-马特乌斯-贝希施泰因-5cba05b4
center.name: 约翰·马特乌斯·贝希施泰因
center.summary: 约翰·马特乌斯·贝希施泰因是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括白背啄木鸟、Red-cheeked parrot、绿宝石鹦鹉等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The red-cheeked parrot (Geoffroyus geoffroyi) is a species of parrot in the family Psittaculidae found in Indonesia, Papua New Guinea and the tip of northern Queensland, Australia. There are 17 subspecies currently recognized

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|Hasties Swamp National Park The white-cheeked honeyeater (Phylidonyris niger) is a species of honeyeater that inhabits the east coast and the south-west corner of Australia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The white-backed woodpecker (Dendrocopos leucotos) is a Eurasian woodpecker belonging to the genus Dendrocopos

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The turquoise parrot (Neophema pulchella) is a species of parrot in the genus Neophema native to Eastern Australia, from southeastern Queensland, through New South Wales and into North-Eastern Victoria
